label: English Grade 6 PH
description: Author's purpose lesson for a Philippine Grade 6 English context, useful for narrative and reading-comprehension prompt experiments.

curriculum.competency_description: Identify the author's purpose for writing a text.

instructional_design.core_concept: Authors write with a specific purpose — to entertain, inform, or persuade — and recognising this purpose helps readers understand and evaluate texts more critically.
bloom_targets: Remember the three main author purposes (entertain, inform, persuade)
Understand how language and tone signal an author's purpose
Apply purpose identification to an unseen passage
instructional_design.essential_question_seed: Why does it matter why an author wrote something?
